tests.description: Cost analogue of the time outer-tighter case. Outer cost guard ($0.000001) is tighter than inner ($1.0). One LLM call charges SYNTHETIC_COST ($0.000002) against both; only the outer exceeds, so the trip carries the OUTER's guardId. Increment-2 guardId matching re-throws it past the inner (which does not own it) and converts at the outer -> 'outer:guardFailure'. Pins the cost half of the nested-routing fix.
